# IdeaStud.io - Andrés Talavera

> Professional portfolio of Andrés Talavera, a .NET developer and Azure consultant based in Lyon, France.

## About

IdeaStud.io is the professional portfolio and resume website for Andrés Talavera, an experienced software engineer specializing in:

- .NET development (ASP.NET Core, Blazor, C#)
- Microsoft Azure cloud architecture and consulting
- Technical training and mentoring
- DevOps and CI/CD practices

## Key Facts

- Name: Andrés Talavera
- Location: Lyon, France
- Languages: French (native), English (fluent), Spanish (native)
- Specializations: .NET, Azure, Blazor, ASP.NET Core, Cloud Architecture
- Experience: 10+ years in software development

## Navigation

- [Home](/): Main resume and portfolio page with professional experience, skills, and training
- [Legal](/legal): Legal mentions and company information
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy

## Services

Andrés Talavera provides professional services including:

- Software development consulting
- Azure cloud migration and architecture
- Technical training for development teams
- Code reviews and architecture assessments

## Contact

For professional inquiries, contact through the website's contact form or LinkedIn profile.

## Content Guidelines

This website contains professional information only. Content is bilingual (French and English). All information is factual and regularly updated.
